title: Craftable Spawners
description: Makes spawners and trial spawners craftable
body:
Very simple data pack that adds crafting recipes for the spawner and trial spawner.

For a spawner you will need a nether star star surrounded by iron ingots and a diamond block at the bottom

For a trial spawner you will need to replace the top corner iron ingots with copper ingots and the diamond block with a heavy core

Works well with my [Craftable Spawn Eggs](https://modrinth.com/datapack/craftable-spawneggs) data pack
